briefdescription.para: Callback for JavaScript result or message.
Callback for video playing status check.
Signal type for page load started events.
Signal type for page load in progress events.
Signal type for page load finished events.
Signal type for frame rendered events.
Signal type for scroll edge reached events.
Signal type for fullscreen enter events.
Signal type for fullscreen exit events.
Signal type for text search results.

memberdef.type: Signal< bool(WebView, const Dali::String &, const Dali::String &)>
memberdef.definition: using Dali::Ui::WebView::GeolocationPermissionSignalType = Signal<bool(WebView, const Dali::String&, const Dali::String&)>

briefdescription.para: Signal type for geolocation permission requests.
Signal type for web process crash events.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether mouse events are enabled.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets whether key events are enabled.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets whether video hole is enabled.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining
Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets whether tiles are cleared when hidden.

parameterdescription.para: True to clear tiles when hidden

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the tile cover area multiplier.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets whether cursor is enabled by client.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable cursor by client

The current URL
The user agent string
The current scroll position
The scroll size
The content size
The page title
The load progress percentage (0.0 - 100.0)
The page zoom factor
The text zoom factor

briefdescription.para: Gets whether mouse events are enabled.

simplesect.para: True if mouse events are enabled

briefdescription.para: Gets whether key events are enabled.

simplesect.para: True if key events are enabled

briefdescription.para: Gets whether video hole is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if video hole is enabled
The selected text
The scale factor

briefdescription.para: Checks if forward navigation is possible.

simplesect.para: True if can go forward

briefdescription.para: Checks if backward navigation is possible.

simplesect.para: True if can go back

briefdescription.para: Loads HTML string with override current entry.

simplesect.para: True on success

memberdef.argsstring: (const int8_t *contents, uint32_t contentSize, const Dali::String &mimeType, const Dali::String &encoding, const Dali::String &baseUri)
memberdef.name: LoadContents

simplesect.para: True on success
True on success
True on success
True on success
True on success

briefdescription.para: Sets the scale factor at a point.

memberdef.argsstring: (bool yDirection, int step, int x, int y)
memberdef.name: FeedMouseWheel

briefdescription.para: Feeds a key event directly to the web engine.

detaileddescription.para: Use this to forward key events to the web engine when automatic key event forwarding is disabled (SetKeyEventsEnabled(false)).

simplesect.para: True if the event was consumed by the web engine

briefdescription.para: Feeds a touch event directly to the web engine.

detaileddescription.para: Use this to forward touch events to the web engine when automatic touch forwarding is disabled (SetMouseEventsEnabled(false)).

simplesect.para: True if the event was consumed by the web engine
An ImageView containing the screenshot

parameterdescription.para: The callback to receive the screenshot

simplesect.para: True if the operation started successfully
An ImageView containing the favicon

parameterdescription.para: The callback to receive the plain text

briefdescription.para: Checks if video is playing asynchronously.

parameterdescription.para: The callback to receive the result

simplesect.para: True if the operation started successfully

parameterdescription.para: The callback to receive the result

briefdescription.para: Signal emitted when page load starts.
Signal emitted while page is loading.
Signal emitted when page load finishes.
Signal emitted when scroll edge is reached.
Signal emitted when a frame is rendered.
Signal emitted when text is found.
Signal emitted for geolocation permission request.
Signal emitted when web process crashes.

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: Creates an initialized WebView and immediately loads the given URL.

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: WebView is a View for displaying web content.

detaileddescription.para: This enables embedding web pages in the application. For a working WebView, a web engine plugin for the target platform must be provided.
